CREATE TABLE haystack_data (id UInt32, haystack String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE needles_data (id UInt32, needle String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT multiSearchAllPositionsUTF8(haystack, groupArray(needle)) FROM haystack_data, needles_data;
SELECT id, multiSearchAllPositionsUTF8(haystack, ['\x41', '\x42']) AS positions FROM haystack_data WHERE positions[1] > 0;
CREATE TABLE search_results AS SELECT id, multiSearchAllPositionsUTF8(haystack, ['\xC3', '\xA9']) AS positions FROM haystack_data;
SELECT id FROM search_results WHERE positions[1] = 0;
SELECT id, multiSearchAllPositionsUTF8(haystack, ['\x41', '\x41', '\x41']) AS occurrences FROM haystack_data;
CREATE TABLE combined_search AS SELECT id, multiSearchAllPositionsUTF8(haystack, ['\xC3\x81', '\xC3\xA9']) AS positions FROM haystack_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM needles_data);
INSERT INTO combined_search SELECT id, multiSearchAllPositionsUTF8(haystack, ['\xC2']) FROM haystack_data WHERE id % 2 = 0;
